titleStmt.title: Hokugi Unho-zan (Tenchu-zan) zensetsu (complete set, 12 vols) (rubbing)
北魏雲峯山（天柱山）全套（拓本）

msIdentifier.repository: ColBase — National Institutes for Cultural Heritage (National Museums of Japan)

msContents.summary: Ink rubbing of a Zheng Daozhao 鄭道昭 (Tei Dōshō) Daoist cliff inscription: Hokugi Unho-zan (Tenchu-zan) zensetsu (complete set, 12 vols). Holding institution: Kyoto National Museum 京都国立博物館 (item B乙315, knmdb key 32106). 12 volumes (12冊). Record-only: image_files empty, images_zip_url null, no thumbnail. Detail API /colbaseapi/v2/collection_items/kyohaku/B%E4%B9%99315 returns HTTP 200 with full metadata, zero images. NOTE id quirk: detail-record numeric id (147075) differs from search-result id (216352) for the same item; both resolve to organization_item_key B乙315. Source-DB link in record: https://knmdb.kyohaku.go.jp/32106.html . This complete Yunfengshan/Tianzhushan set covers the canonical Zheng Daozhao cliff group (論經書詩, 觀海島詩, 天柱山銘, etc.).

support.objectType: 拓片 · ink rubbing on paper

origin.origDate: No date fields populated (jidai_seiki null). Original carvings: Northern Wei (北魏), Zheng Daozhao's Yunfengshan and Tianzhushan cliff inscriptions in Shandong. Rubbing date not stated.

bibl.ref: ColBase — National Institutes for Cultural Heritage (National Museums of Japan) — record

revisionDesc.change: Zheng Daozhao 鄭道昭 (Tei Dōshō) Daoist cliff inscription; harvested from ColBase — National Institutes for Cultural Heritage (National Museums of Japan) via the Epiwen Japanese-repository workflow. Provenance-only (no public IIIF image).

div.p: Ink rubbing — see the linked record/manifest.
